title: RealTime HUD
description: Display real-world time on your Minecraft HUD with customizable position and format
body:
# RealTime HUD

A simple and customizable mod that displays your real-world system time on your Minecraft HUD.

## Features
✨ Real-time clock display on your HUD
📍 Four position presets (Top Left, Top Right, Bottom Left, Bottom Right)
🎨 Adjustable horizontal and vertical padding
🕐 Toggle between 24-hour and 12-hour format
⌨️ Convenient keybindings (R to toggle, F to change format)
⚙️ Easy configuration via Mod Menu
💾 Settings persist between game sessions
Quick previews
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b0dd4d7fc1eacd24a7950dfd4c91f8a9df53490.png)
![Configuration Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61623ec12db889647559a5b7a58789baab79567b_0.webp)
## Requirements
- Minecraft 1.21.x
- Fabric Loader 0.16.0+
- Fabric API
- Mod Menu (recommended)

## Keybindings
- **R** - Toggle HUD on/off
- **F** - Switch between 24h/12h format
- Or configure everything via Mod Menu!

## Configuration
Access the config screen through Mod Menu to customize:
- Screen position
- Padding adjustments
- Time format preference
